title: The Elders Hunt the Broadcast
description: On pages 9–11, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Atlas, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Dorry, Brogy as Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.
scene: Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Head to the ship!! We're getting out of here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Rescuing them was our only goal!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gya ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're signaling a retreat? That won't do... allow me to blow a "horn" of my own.

dialogue.speaker: Atlas
dialogue.text: It'll drive home the futility of escape!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You held on?! Your body's so funky! Gegya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya

summary: This part advances the Vegapunk’s Broadcast through 23 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
